claim_boundary: Historical pre-0.5 structural summary of detector-labelled rows. Public validation does not replay private response bytes; canary-zero and causal-reopening interpretations are withdrawn, and the current schema has no committed execution.
non_claims: A live local-model failure is not a CVE.
A block in this campaign is not proof that a production swarm is secure.
Response hash fields are commitments; without owner-side reconciliation they do not prove private-byte retention, origin, or semantic truth.
